title: Decision Snapshot (Unified Read Interface)
description: An immutable point-in-time snapshot merging Features, State, and Constraints to guarantee deterministic execution without clock skew.

snapshot_id.description: Unique UUID for this specific decision evaluation frame.

clock_timestamp.description: The exact UTC millisecond timestamp when this snapshot was assembled.

constraint_version.description: Hash or version tag of the Tier 3 spec used for this snapshot.

feature_snapshot.description: Raw numerical features pulled from L2.2 at the time of assembly.

state_snapshot.description: Derived probabilistic states pulled from L2.5 at the time of assembly.

states.description: Dictionary of strongly typed state variables (Regime, P_30d, etc.)
